source: Homebrew, Mörk Borg voice. Faction list is canonical (wiki/factions).
occupations: Tanner — stinks of piss and lye
secrets: Is dying of a disease they cannot name. They know.
Owes coin to someone who will collect, soon.
Stole something small from someone large.
Has a sibling in the Inquisition. Will not speak of it.
Has seen the Seventh Misery in dreams. Three times now.
Is hunting a member of the party. Does not yet know which one.
Is being hunted. Their friendliness is bait.
Has a child they cannot speak of.
Privately worships a god the Two-Headed Basilisks would burn them for.
Knows where a worthless thing is hidden. Believes it priceless.
Knows where a priceless thing is buried. Believes it worthless.
Killed someone in this town. The body has not been found.
Is not who they claim to be. The real one is in a ditch outside.
Carries a cursed object and does not know it.
Has had visions of the death of whoever asks them too many questions.
Is already dead. Has not yet noticed.
Betrayed the party once, in a life neither remembers.
Will sell out the party for 50 silver. Less if drunk.
Will die defending the party for reasons even they could not explain.
Their name is written in the Calendar of Nechrubel. Underlined.
